data.title: Specialty Program Group bought ANOVA Marine Insurance to expand transportation capabilities on July 31, 2025.
data.description: Specialty Program Group LLC (SPG), a prominent operator in specialty insurance distribution, underwriting, and consulting, recently announced the acquisition of ANOVA Marine Insurance Services, LLC ("ANOVA"). The acquisition, finalized on July 31, 2025, represents SPG's strategic move towards expanding its services portfolio. ANOVA, known for its advanced technology and comprehensive marine insurance offerings, is expected to bolster SPG's market presence and enhance its capabilities in the marine insurance sector. This acquisition marks another milestone for SPG as they continue to strengthen their position in the industry.

data.title: New book by New York rabbi explores faith in modern world targeting multi-denominational audience.
data.description: In New York on July 31, 2025, a new book titled "A Truth versus The Truth: How Religious Individuals Navigate the Modern World" is set to be released by Rabbi Stephen B. Roberts. This publication intends to cater to a diverse audience across various religious denominations. The book explores the intersection of faith and the contemporary society, offering insights into how religious individuals either embrace or resist aspects of the modern world. It provides a comprehensive analysis of this dynamic, appealing to a wide range of readers interested in understanding the complexities of faith in today's society.
The United Nations Security Council holds a briefing on threats to international peace and security.
EXPLOSIONS ROCK MASHHAD, IRAN—MASSIVE INDUSTRIAL FIRE BREAKS OUT

data.title: Dow Jones rises on nearing China trade deal. Nasdaq gains. Arm falls 11%. Meta produces alternate entry.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase due to signs indicating the potential closure of a trade agreement with China. Arm, a partner of Nvidia, saw a significant drop in its earnings. In the stock market today, the Nasdaq led in gains. Meta presented an alternate entry opportunity, while Arm experienced a notable 11% decline.
RBC Reduces AB InBev's Price Target To EUR72 From EUR77

data.title: Inventor in Pittsburgh develops innovative pay out system for gaming industry, eliminates need for reinserting paper tickets.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 31, 2025, an individual working in the gaming sector expressed their innovation to develop a more efficient payout method. This new system allows for redemption in any machine without the need for a specific protocol to validate the ticket. Additionally, users will not have to reinsert the paper ticket into a machine. This innovation aims to streamline the payout process and enhance user experience.

data.title: 360Quadrants highlights top Smart Pills companies in their latest report, acknowledging global giants and emerging innovators.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on July 31, 2025, a recent report by 360Quadrants evaluates startups and SMEs in the Smart Pills industry. The assessment highlights top performers in market presence, product innovation, and overall business performance. This includes established global leaders as well as promising new entrants, showcasing their strengths and contributions to the sector.

data.title: Contract research organization market to reach USD 122.2 billion by 2032, driven by pharmaceutical industry's focus on novel medications.
data.description: The contract research organization sector is experiencing significant growth due to the pharmaceutical industry's growing emphasis on developing new medications for chronic illnesses. This trend is driving expansion, with an increasing number of companies like SkyQuest Technology Consulting in WESTFORD, Mass., entering the market. As of July 31, 2025, the sector is witnessing a surge in demand for research services, with a noticeable increase in investments and collaborations to propel innovation in drug development.

data.title: Saviynt's Identity Cloud chosen by LIXIL to manage 70,000 identities, ensuring improved user experience and compliance readiness.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Saviynt, renowned for AI-driven identity security and governance solutions, revealed that LIXIL Corporation, a key player in water and housing sectors, opted for Saviynt’s Identity Cloud. This move aims to bolster LIXIL's global identity management setup, catering to over 70,000 identities. The system upgrade promises enhanced user experience, readiness for compliance regulations, and centralized visibility throughout the organization. Notably, LIXIL boasts a workforce exceeding 53,000 employees.

data.title: Tech giants worth over $19 trillion, now 35% of S&P 500. Magnificent Seven reshaping market rules with record value.
data.description: The top tech giants on Wall Street are reshaping market dominance, with the Magnificent Seven surging to a record-breaking $19.4 trillion in combined market value. This unprecedented growth is transforming the composition of the S&P 500 index, astonishing investors. The MAGS ETF is experiencing rapid movement. Microsoft Corp. (MSFT) and Meta Platforms Inc. (META) played pivotal roles in boosting the overall valuation with their impressive earnings reports. This group, which includes Nvidia Corp. (NVDA), Apple Inc. (AAPL), Amazon.com Inc. (AMZN), Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL), and Tesla Inc. (TSLA), now represents 35% of the S&P 500's total value, marking a new record for index concentration. The collective market cap now surpasses that of China's entire economy, valued at $18.7 trillion in 2024. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bristol Myers' revenues reach $12.27B in Q2 2025, US sales down 3% to $8.5B, international up 10% to $3.8B. Opdivo sales at $2.56B.
data.description: Bristol Myers Squibb & Co (NYSE: BMY) released their second-quarter 2025 financial results, showcasing revenues of $12.27 billion. This surpassed the anticipated $11.31 billion and remained relatively stable compared to the previous year. U.S. sales saw a 3% decline to $8.5 billion, while international revenues saw a 10% increase to $3.8 billion, representing an 8% growth when excluding foreign exchange impacts (Ex-FX). The Growth Portfolio revenues reached $6.6 billion, marking an 18% increase, or 17% Ex-FX. The revenue surge was primarily fueled by the immuno-oncology (IO) portfolio, Breyanzi, Reblozyl, and Camzyos, emphasizing the sustained success of Cobenfy, a schizophrenia drug. Specifically, sales of the cancer drug Opdivo rose by 7% to $2.56 billion. Additionally, the arthritis drug Orencia achieved sales of $963 million.

data.title: Chartwells K12 introduces bold dips and sauces in fall cafeteria menu to make school meals more exciting for students.
data.description: In the fall of 2025, Chartwells K12 introduced a new menu promotion in school cafeterias featuring bold and kid-approved dips and sauces. Located in Charlotte, North Carolina, this initiative aimed to offer healthy meal options that parents can trust for their children. With the return to school, the company sought to enhance students' dining experiences by providing flavorful choices. This initiative was part of efforts to ensure that kids have access to nutritious and enjoyable meals while at school.
The Iranian President warns of the possibility of dams supplying the capital Tehran with water drying up in the coming months if consumption is not reduced.

data.title: North America's smart metering industry sees second-wave rollouts with 75% share by 2030. Asia-Pacific leads, NA ranks third.
data.description: In Dublin, the "Smart Metering in North America - 7th Edition" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Smart metering is essential for future smart grids and is being implemented globally. Asia-Pacific leads the market, with North America ranking third after Europe. The report details the growth of smart meter deployment in developed and developing nations.

data.title: Ethereum turns 10 with rising demand and activity: Daily active addresses hit second-highest level of 2025, 680,670 wallets active. Whale activity surges with 14,628 transactions over $100,000 and wallets holding between 10,000-100,000 ETH accumulate 1.55 million ETH in three weeks. Ethereum ranks 10th in daily GitHub events with 157 major updates.
data.description: The Ethereum network recently marked its tenth anniversary, with analytics platform Santiment reporting an increase in demand and activity. According to Santiment data shared on July 30, Ethereum saw a surge in daily active addresses, reaching the second-highest level of the year at 680,670 on July 27. Mean Value to Realized Value (MVRV) data indicated significant unrealized gains for traders, with a +38% increase for annual active wallets and +15% for monthly ones. Whale activity also intensified, with 14,628 transactions exceeding $100,000, the fourth-highest volume in the current year. Wallets holding between 10,000–100,000 ETH acquired 1.55 million ETH in just three weeks, signifying strong buying activity. Additionally, Ethereum holds the 10th position in daily GitHub events with 157 significant... (For complete details, please refer to the Benzinga website)

data.title: Six new escalators added to NYC subway stations by Entuitive, enhancing accessibility and flow. Major milestone in MTA upgrades.
data.description: New York City's MTA infrastructure reached a significant milestone with the completion of major subway station upgrades, where the lead designer Entuitive provided structural and construction engineering services. The project included the installation of six escalators in total. This achievement was celebrated with a launch event in New York on July 31, 2025.

data.title: SKYX reports Q2 2025 revenues of $23.1M, up from $20.1M in Q1, showing market penetration growth.
data.description: Leading technology company SKYX has made an early announcement regarding their exceptional financial performance in the second quarter of 2025. The company reported record revenues amounting to $23.1 million for the quarter, marking a significant increase from the $20.1 million generated in the first quarter of the same year. This notable growth in revenue demonstrates SKYX's continued success and expansion in the market.

data.title: XRP surged 42% in July to $3.09, reaching a market cap of $183.4 billion. Analysts predict a potential breakout to $3.60.
data.description: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has experienced a significant 42% surge in the last month, driven by positive market sentiment and advancements in regulatory policies. The current price for XRP stands at $3.09 with a market cap of $183.4 billion, representing a 7-day decrease of 1.4%. On the other hand, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is priced at $118,126.96, boasting a market cap of $2.35 trillion and a minor 7-day increase of 0.09%. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is currently valued at $3,779.30, with a market cap of $456.2 billion and a 7-day growth of 4%.Crypto expert Ali Martinez has identified a potential double bottom pattern on XRP’s 4-hour chart. Confirmation of a breakout above $3.30 could signal a significant price rally towards $3.60. Martinez suggests that XRP may be on the verge of forming a double bottom formation, underlining the importance of breaching the $3.30 mark for potential further upside towards $3.60. For more insights, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Appeals court overturns conviction of Nathaniel Chastain for wire fraud and money laundering in OpenSea insider trading case.
data.description: Nathaniel Chastain, a former employee at OpenSea, has effectively appealed his conviction for wire fraud and money laundering. The case involved significant amounts of money and legal proceedings, but Chastain was able to overturn the initial judgment.
